title: Polynomial, Rational, and Nonlinear Models · Model Lens: Polynomial Fit
summary: Compare alternative growth and geometry models for a production process. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int polynomial fit increment in a nonlinear model comparison report. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Fit and critique polynomial models without extrapolating unsupported behavior.
Relate polynomial degree, roots, multiplicity, end behavior, and turning points.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Calculate Polynomial Fit evidence

content.text: Use Δoutput/Δinput = (23 − 11) / (7 − 3). Reconcile the result with this competency evidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Fit and critique polynomial models without extrapolating unsupported behavior.
